search.query: `meraki_index` sourcetype="meraki:organizations" | dedup id | table id, name

`meraki_index` sourcetype="meraki:securityappliances" $orgid$ | dedup occurredAt, deviceSerial |spath description | rename eventData.summary as Summary | eval Summary = if(isnull(Summary),"-",Summary) | rename clientId as "Client ID", deviceName as "Device Name", deviceSerial as "Device Serial",description as "Description", category as "Category" ,occurredAt as "Occured At" | table "Client ID", "Device Name", "Device Serial","Description" ,"Summary", "Category" ,"Occured At"

drilldown.link: search?q=`meraki_index` sourcetype="meraki:securityappliances" $orgid$ | dedup occurredAt, deviceSerial |spath description | rename eventData.summary as Summary | eval Summary = if(isnull(Summary),"-",Summary) |search clientId="$row.Client ID$" deviceName="$row.Device Name$" deviceSerial="$row.Device Serial$" description="$row.Description$" Summary="$row.Summary$" category="$row.Category$" occurredAt="$row.Occured At$"&earliest=$time.earliest$&latest=$time.latest$

search.query: `meraki_index` sourcetype="meraki:securityappliances" $orgid$ | dedup occurredAt, deviceSerial | stats count as Count by category | sort - 0 Count | rename category as "Category"

drilldown.link: search?q=`meraki_index` sourcetype="meraki:securityappliances" $orgid$ | dedup occurredAt, deviceSerial | search category="$click.value$"&earliest=$time.earliest$&latest=$time.latest$

search.query: `meraki_index` sourcetype="meraki:securityappliances" category="ip_conflicts" $orgid$ | dedup occurredAt, deviceSerial | stats count as Count by deviceName | rename deviceName as "Device Name" | sort - 0 Count

drilldown.link: search?q=`meraki_index` sourcetype="meraki:securityappliances" category="ip_conflicts" $orgid$ | dedup occurredAt, deviceSerial | search deviceName="$click.value$"&earliest=$time.earliest$&latest=$time.latest$

search.query: `meraki_index` sourcetype="meraki:securityappliances" $orgid$ | dedup occurredAt, deviceSerial | timechart count as "Events Occured" span=1d
